LARGE HAIL DAMAGED A WINDOW ON A HOUSE AND DESTROYED A GARDEN. THE HAIL CREATED A SWATH OF TOTAL CROP DAMAGE THAT WAS A HALF MILE TO ONE MILE WIDE AND AT LEAST THREE MILES LONG. INFORMATION WAS RELAYED FROM GARFIELD COUNTY EXTENSION AGENT AND THEN FROM PROPERTY OWNERS. HAIL DURATION 5 MINUTES.
LARGE HAIL DAMAGED A GARDEN AND PLANTS. CROP DAMAGE WAS MORE SIGNIFICANT TO THEIR SOUTH AND WEST.

WINDS ON THE 500 PM OBSERVATION WERE AT 44 GUSTING TO 60 MPH. ON THE 6 PM OBSERVATION THEY WERE STILL BLOWING HARD AT 53 MPH GUSTING TO 67 MPH. THESE WINDS WERE A COMBINATION OF THUNDERSTORM AND POST-COLD FRONT. TSTM WND GST DURATION 1 HOUR 5 MINUTES.

ORIGINAL WIND GUST HIT 59 MPH AT 456 PM. THE WINDS WERE CONVECTIVE AND POST-COLD FRONT AND GUSTED ABOVE 58 MPH FOR NEARLY AN HOUR. THE PEAK WIND GUST WAS 60 MPH AT 553 PM. THE FINAL GUST WAS 58 MPH AT 554 PM BEFORE WINDS DECREASED TO 25 TO 35 MPH. THERE WERE NUMEROUS LARGE TREE BRANCHES DOWN AROUND TOWN, AND SHINGLES DAMAGED. TSTM WND GST DURATION 58 MINUTES.
